case_title: JOSEP ORIOL BATALLA ALCALDE VS. ESSEX PROPERTY TRUST, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-07-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-13-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH ORIOL BATALLA ALCALDE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ESSEX PROPERTY TRUST, INC. IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DANIELLE REYES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ESSEX PROPERTY TRUST, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BATALLA ALCALDE, JOSEP ORIOL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESSEX PROPERTY TRUST, INC. $11,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
